TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_kawlah, title = kawlah, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/kawlah} }

S.FORM: kawlah (kamu nu Hulam: ÁçéÂãµ ,ÁçéÁãÄ,ÁçéÂìÅ) u tatipeluk atu tuud ku sapapabeli i kapahay a tademaw, nikaseneng niza.
S.PHON: kawr~…æaƒß (kamu nu ƒßur~…æam: ** ,**,**) u tatip…ôr~…æuk atu tuud ku sapapab…ôr~…æi i kapaƒßaj a tad…ômaw, nikas…ôn…ô≈ã niza.
